description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Fragmentary (upper right corner). Addressed to someone titled Raʾs al-Kull (=Rosh Kalla). Mentions a woman who was connected to a certain kind of man (wa-kānat muttaṣila bi-rajul ḍā[...]...). Also mentions Riḍā al-Ṭabīb (the physician).
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
